case_title: WALTERS, JOSHUA J. et al VS GRAY, WALTER A.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALTERS, JOSHUA J. STODDART, STEVEN C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAY, WALTER A. $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY WALTERS, JOSHUA J. STODDART, STEVEN C. AS TO DEFENDANT GRAY, WALTER A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRAY, WALTER A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GRAY, WALTER A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $959.50 AS TO DEFENDANT GRAY, WALTER A.
